mapper.select: SELECT m.nickname AS nickname, m.grade AS grade, m.point AS point, m.image_url AS imageUrl FROM member m WHERE m.id = #{memberId}

SELECT wd.id AS id, ai.name AS itemName, -- 상품 이름 wd.status AS status, -- 거래 상태 wd.winner_price AS winnerPrice, -- 구매 금액 wd.created_at AS createdAt -- 거래 생성일 FROM winner_deal wd
-- 낙찰된 경매 정보 연결 INNER JOIN auction a ON wd.auction_id = a.id
-- 경매에 연결된 상품 정보 INNER JOIN auction_item ai ON a.item_id = ai.id
WHERE wd.winner_id = #{memberId}
AND wd.status != 'CANCELLED' ORDER BY wd.created_at DESC -- 최신순 LIMIT 3 -- 최근 3건만 노출

SELECT ii.url AS imageUrl, -- 상품 대표 이미지 URL ai.name AS itemName, -- 상품 이름 mb.auction_id AS auctionId, COALESCE(a.vickrey_price, a.start_price) AS currentPrice, -- 현재가(차순위가 없으면 시작가) mb.myBidPrice AS myBidPrice, -- 내가 해당 경매에서 입찰한 최고 금액 a.end_date AS endDate, -- 경매 종료일 a.status AS status -- 경매 상태 FROM ( -- 한 경매에 여러 번 입찰 가능, MAX()로 "내 최고 입찰가" 뽑기 SELECT b.auction_id, MAX(b.amount) AS myBidPrice FROM bid b WHERE b.bidder_id = #{memberId} -- 경매에 참여한 사용자 id GROUP BY b.auction_id ) mb
INNER JOIN auction a ON a.id = mb.auction_id
INNER JOIN auction_item ai ON a.item_id = ai.id
LEFT JOIN item_image ii ON ii.item_id = ai.id AND ii.`display_order` = 1
ORDER BY a.end_date DESC LIMIT 2

SELECT id, name, nickname, email, image_url AS imageUrl, point, bank_code AS bankCode, bank_account AS bankAccount, grade, role, status, last_change_nick AS lastChangeNick, created_at AS createdAt FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET point = point - #{amount} WHERE id = #{id} AND point >= #{amount};
mapper.select:
SELECT m.image_url AS imageUrl, m.name AS name, m.nickname AS nickname, m.email AS email, m.grade AS grade, a.zipcode AS zipcode, a.address AS address, a.detail_address AS detailAddress,
m.bank_code AS bankCode, m.bank_account AS bankAccount,
m.created_at AS createdAt,
COALESCE(r.reviewCount, 0) AS reviewCount, COALESCE(r.ratingAvg, 0) AS ratingAvg
FROM member m LEFT JOIN address a ON m.id = a.member_id AND a.default_yn = 1
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT target_id, COUNT(*) AS reviewCount, AVG(rating) AS ratingAvg FROM review GROUP BY target_id ) r ON m.id = r.target_id
WHERE m.id = #{memberId}

SELECT id, username, password, name, nickname, email, image_url AS imageUrl, point, bank_code AS bankCode, bank_account AS bankAccount, grade, role, status, last_change_nick AS lastChangeNick, created_at AS createdAt FROM member WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT id, username, password, name, nickname, email, image_url AS imageUrl, point, bank_code AS bankCode, bank_account AS bankAccount, grade, role, status, last_change_nick AS lastChangeNick, created_at AS createdAt FROM member WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT id, username, password, name, nickname, email, image_url AS imageUrl, point, bank_code AS bankCode, bank_account AS bankAccount, grade, role, status, last_change_nick AS lastChangeNick, created_at AS createdAt FROM member WHERE nickname = #{nickname}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO member ( username, name, nickname, email, role, image_url, created_at ) VALUES (
#{username}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{role}, #{imageUrl}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE member
nickname = #{request.nickname}, last_change_nick = NOW(),
image_url = #{request.imageUrl},
bank_code = #{request.bankCode},
bank_account = #{request.bankAccount},
WHERE id = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
SELECT wd.id AS id, ai.name AS itemName, -- 상품명 wd.status AS status, -- 거래 상태 wd.winner_price AS winnerPrice, -- 판매 금액(낙찰 금액) wd.created_at AS createdAt -- 거래 생성일 FROM winner_deal wd
-- 거래와 연결된 경매 정보 조회 INNER JOIN auction a ON wd.auction_id = a.id
-- 경매에 연결된 상품 정보 조회 INNER JOIN auction_item ai ON a.item_id = ai.id
-- 해당 회원이 판매자인 거래만 조회 WHERE wd.seller_id = #{memberId}
-- 진행 중인 판매 현황만 조회 AND wd.status != 'CANCELLED'
-- 최신 거래 순으로 정렬 ORDER BY wd.created_at DESC
-- 3건만 노출 LIMIT 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM winner_deal wd WHERE wd.seller_id = #{memberId} AND wd.status IN ('PAID', 'CONFIRMED')

SELECT ai.name AS itemName, seller.name AS sellerName, wd.winner_price AS price, wd.confirmed_at AS completedAt, wd.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus FROM winner_deal wd INNER JOIN auction a ON wd.auction_id = a.id INNER JOIN auction_item ai ON a.item_id = ai.id INNER JOIN member seller ON wd.seller_id = seller.id WHERE wd.winner_id = #{memberId} AND wd.status IN ('PAID', 'CONFIRMED')
ORDER BY wd.confirmed_at ASC
ORDER BY wd.confirmed_at DESC
LIMIT #{pageRequest.size} OFFSET #{pageRequest.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM winner_deal wd WHERE wd.winner_id = #{memberId} AND wd.status IN ('PAID', 'CONFIRMED')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member
role = 'USER'
AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND status = #{status}

SELECT m.nickname AS nickname, m.image_url AS imageUrl, m.grade AS grade, m.created_at AS createdAt,
-- 평균 평점 및 리뷰 수 (SELECT ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0), 1) FROM review WHERE target_id = #{memberId}) AS rating,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE target_id = #{memberId}) AS reviewCount,
-- 총 판매 건수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM winner_deal WHERE seller_id = #{memberId} AND status IN ('PAID','SHIPPED','CONFIRMED')) AS totalSales,
-- 판매 취소 건수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM winner_deal WHERE seller_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'CANCELLED') AS cancelCount,
-- 실제 응답률 계산 (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'ANSWERED' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100) END FROM auction_inquiry WHERE answerer_id = #{memberId}) AS responseRate FROM member m WHERE m.id = #{memberId} AND m.status != 'DELETED'
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM bid b INNER JOIN auction a ON b.auction_id = a.id WHERE b.bidder_id = #{memberId} AND a.status = 'ON_GOING' AND b.status = 'ACTIVE' )
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM winner_deal WHERE (winner_id = #{memberId} OR seller_id = #{memberId}) AND status != 'CONFIRMED' )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM winner_deal WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED' AND (winner_id = #{memberId} OR seller_id = #{memberId})

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM auction a WHERE a.seller_id = #{memberId} AND ( #{type} = 'ALL' OR (#{type} = 'PENDING' AND a.status = 'PENDING') OR (#{type} = 'ONGOING' AND a.status = 'ON_GOING') OR (#{type} = 'SUCCESS' AND a.status = 'ENDED' AND a.winner_id IS NOT NULL) OR (#{type} = 'FAILED' AND a.status = 'ENDED' AND a.winner_id IS NULL) OR (#{type} = 'CANCELLED' AND a.status = 'CANCELLED') )

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ON_GOING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ongoingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ENDED' AND a.winner_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ENDED' AND a.winner_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedCount FROM auction a WHERE a.seller_id = #{memberId}
SELECT * FROM member WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM member WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT id FROM member WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND role = 'ADMIN'
